hero.title: Platform terms, contracts and policies
hero.subtitle: Review the conditions applicable to the use of MiChofer, including contracts, conduct rules, safety, payments, cancellations, privacy and liability.

usersContract.label: Contract 01
usersContract.title: Platform Use and Access Agreement for Users
usersContract.intro: This agreement regulates the terms and conditions applicable to the use of the digital platform operated by MICHOFER SOCIEDAD ANÓNIMA DE CAPITAL VARIABLE.
usersContract.objectText: The User acknowledges and accepts that the Company acts solely as a technology intermediary. The Company does not directly provide transportation services.
usersContract.req1: Be of legal age and have legal capacity to contract.
usersContract.req2: Provide truthful, complete and updated information.
usersContract.req3: Accept identity, phone or fraud prevention verification processes.
usersContract.req4: Maintain the confidentiality of account credentials.
usersContract.req5: Use the Platform in accordance with the law, the agreement and current policies.
usersContract.servicesText: The User may request or schedule rides or parcel services through the Platform, indicating pickup point and destination when applicable.
usersContract.paymentsText: The final fare may vary due to distance, time, traffic, alternate routes, stops, tolls, destination changes, waiting time or other applicable charges.

driversContract.label: Contract 02
driversContract.title: Platform Use and Access License Agreement for Drivers
driversContract.intro: This agreement regulates the terms applicable to the access and use of the Platform by the affiliated Driver.
driversContract.relationText: This agreement does not create an employment, agency, partnership, franchise or representation relationship. There is no subordination, exclusivity or fixed salary.
driversContract.req1: Be of legal age and have legal capacity to contract.
driversContract.req3: Have a vehicle in adequate mechanical and safety condition.
driversContract.req5: Maintain a unique and personal account.
driversContract.obl1: Provide the service with diligence, respect and professionalism.
driversContract.obl2: Comply with applicable traffic laws and regulations.
driversContract.obl3: Do not operate under the influence of alcohol, drugs or substances that affect driving ability.
driversContract.obl4: Do not charge amounts outside the app without authorization.
driversContract.obl5: Do not transport illegal, dangerous, flammable or legally prohibited items.

rules.label: Safety
rules.title: Platform Conduct and Safety Rules
rules.user1: Maintain respectful treatment toward drivers and third parties.
rules.user2: Do not engage in harassment, threats, violence or discrimination.
rules.user3: Do not damage the vehicle or endanger the driver.
rules.user4: Do not consume or carry illegal substances during the ride.
rules.driver1: Provide the service with diligence and professionalism.
rules.driver4: Do not operate under the influence of alcohol or drugs.
rules.driver5: Do not allow third parties to use the account.

policies.label: Policies
policies.title: Current Platform Policies
policies.natureText: The Platform acts exclusively as a technology intermediary and connection facilitator between users and drivers.
policies.payment1: Fares may vary due to distance, time, traffic, waiting time or trip changes.
policies.payment2: Charges may apply for cancellations, waiting time, damages or cleaning.
policies.payment3: Payments must be made only through authorized methods.
policies.cancel1: The User may cancel before the ride begins.
policies.cancel4: The Driver may cancel for safety reasons.
policies.claimsText: Claims must be submitted through official channels. The maximum period for payment objections is 72 hours.

privacy.label: Privacy
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.text: Personal data will be used only for service execution, safety, support, fraud prevention, dispute resolution and legal compliance.
privacy.item1: Data must not be used for unauthorized personal purposes.
privacy.item2: Contacting outside the Platform without authorization is prohibited.
privacy.item3: The User may exercise rights of access, correction and update.
privacy.item4: The Platform may cooperate with authorities when legally required.

cookies.label: Cookies
cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.text1: The website may use cookies or similar technologies to improve the experience, analyze site usage, remember preferences and strengthen browsing security.
cookies.text2: The user may configure the browser to reject cookies, although some site features may be limited.

acceptance.label: Acceptance
acceptance.title: Electronic Acceptance
acceptance.text: Contracts and policies are perfected through electronic acceptance, without the need for a handwritten signature.

law.label: Jurisdiction
law.title: Applicable Law
law.text: These contracts, terms and policies are governed by the laws of the Republic of El Salvador and the jurisdiction of San Salvador.
